definitions.text: A sense of awe, astonishment and curiosity, inspired by unexpected events, novel experiences and inexplicable circumstances, sometimes accompanied by surprise, shock or reverence.
Something that causes amazement or awe; a marvel.
examples: Wonders of the World seem to come in sevens.
That stay in the country did her wonders.
That stay in the country did her wonders.
It's a wonder no-one saw me.

definitions.text: To be affected with surprise or admiration; to be struck with astonishment; to be amazed; to marvel; often followed by at.
examples: He's married by now, I shouldn't wonder.

definitions.text: To ponder; to feel doubt and curiosity; to query in the mind.
examples: He wondered whether penguins could fly. She had wondered this herself sometimes.
Has Jay gone fishing, I wonder?
